Calle Habana Band is an international band based in Barcelona that fuses English pop with Latin rhythms like salsa, bachata, merengue, and cumbia, plus funk, soul, and R&B influences. They specialize in weddings, corporate events, and private parties across Spain, offering customized packages with a vibrant, elegant show and a repertoire of over 200 songs.
